name: pepflow-workflows
description: Codex skills adapted from the PEPFlow Claude command workflows for PEP convergence analysis and Lyapunov proof discovery.

interface.shortDescription: PEPFlow convergence-analysis and Lyapunov-proof workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex-native skills adapted from the existing PEPFlow Claude slash-command workflows. They preserve the original block structure while adding Codex execution guidance for repository inspection, file edits, state files, and verification.
defaultPrompt: Use pep-implement to create a PEPFlow setup for this algorithm.
Use pep-full-proof for the implemented algorithm.
Use lyap-analyze after pep-analyze to discover a Lyapunov function.
